description_long: This bungalow features a broad, cross-gabled roof with deep overhangs and exposed wooden beams, giving it a rustic yet refined appearance. The exterior walls are clad in a combination of natural stone at the base and horizontal wooden siding above, creating a warm, inviting facade. Large balconies and covered porches extend from the main structure, supported by sturdy timber posts and stone columns. Multiple sets of wide windows and glass doors line the building, allowing ample natural light into the interior and providing views from all sides. The roof is finished in dark shingles, and there are visible chimneys and vent pipes, suggesting the presence of fireplaces or stoves inside. The overall design is spacious, with a strong emphasis on outdoor living and integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A spacious, cross-gabled bungalow with stone and wood exterior, deep overhangs, and large balconies. Features wide windows, covered porches, and a dark shingled roof.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance with a prominent covered porch, stone columns, and a wide balcony above.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the extended wing, additional balcony space, and visible chimney on the roof.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a symmetrical arrangement with two chimneys, a large balcony, and extensive window coverage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the secondary entrance, wooden siding, and a smaller covered porch area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
